findings: Audit in progress. Prior year qualified opinion on irregular expenditure expected to be resolved. Emphasis of matter on going concern and debt sustainability anticipated.
managementResponse: Eskom engaging with auditors on irregular expenditure remediation and going concern disclosures.

findings: Audit in progress. Prior year findings on procurement irregularities and cable theft losses being addressed.
managementResponse: Transnet implementing procurement reform programme and enhanced security measures.

findings: Qualified opinion on prior year comparative figures. Unqualified opinion on FY2024 results. Three management letter points on contract management, export licence compliance, and IT security.
recommendations: Strengthen contract management framework; implement export compliance monitoring system; upgrade IT security controls.
managementResponse: All findings accepted. Contract management policy updated. Export compliance officer appointed. IT security upgrade budgeted for FY2025.

companyName: South African National Roads Agency SOC Limited (SANRAL)
findings: Clean audit opinion. No material findings on financial statements or performance information. One management letter point on minor procurement documentation gaps.
managementResponse: Electronic document management system implemented for procurement records.

companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa (PRASA)
findings: Audit in progress. Prior year disclaimer of opinion being addressed through improved financial management and record-keeping.
managementResponse: PRASA implementing comprehensive financial management improvement plan under new CFO.
